lines: And so, Duke joined the Hero’s Haven staff.
With renewed purpose, he worked tirelessly to restore its image.
His flashy style gave the saloon a much-needed boost.
For the first time in months, the saloon made a profit.
Its reputation slowly began to recover.
Within months, the townsfolk saw Hero’s Haven differently.
Though, business dipped briefly after a certain article.
Bobby cried tears of joy for an entire week.
This news wasn’t pleasing to everyone...
That company Ted mentioned had a powerful leader.
And so, the real story begins...
